nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (Every 6h)
nodes.notes: Runs analysis every 6 hours. Adjust as needed.

nodes.name: Webhook Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: POST /pricing-agent/run with optional body: { product_id, override_price }

nodes.name: Load Internal Data
nodes.notes: Seeds product, sales history, demand signals. Replace with live DB/Sheets calls.

nodes.name: Fetch Competitor Prices (API/Scrape)
nodes.notes: Replace URL with competitor pricing page or a pricing intelligence API (e.g., Prisync, Wiser, Price2Spy). Falls back to mock data on error.

nodes.name: Normalize Competitor Data
nodes.notes: Removes price outliers via IQR, computes market stats, determines our position.

nodes.name: Demand Elasticity Model
nodes.notes: Computes PED via linear regression. Classifies demand sensitivity. Calculates demand quality score.

nodes.name: Price Simulation Engine
nodes.notes: Core engine. Tests all price points. Calculates CR, volume, revenue, profit, risk. Finds profit-max and balanced-growth optima.

nodes.name: Build Analysis Payload
nodes.notes: Computes confidence score. Packages all data into clean payload for Claude.

parameters.text:
=You are a senior pricing strategist and behavioral economist. Analyze this pricing intelligence data and produce a clear, executive-level pricing recommendation report.

DATA:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.analysis_payload, null, 2) }}

Produce a structured report in this EXACT JSON format:
{
  "executive_summary": "2-3 sentences explaining the core recommendation and why",
  "market_insight": "What the competitor landscape tells us and how we should position",
  "demand_insight": "What the elasticity data reveals about customer price sensitivity",
  "primary_recommendation": {
    "price": <number>,
    "rationale": "Clear explanation of WHY this exact price",
    "expected_impact": "Revenue and profit impact in plain English",
    "implementation": "How to roll this out (immediate/phased/test first)"
  },
  "alternative_strategy": {
    "price": <number>,
    "name": "e.g. Volume Growth Strategy or Margin Defense Strategy",
    "rationale": "When to choose this instead",
    "trade_off": "What you gain vs what you give up"
  },
  "risks": ["risk 1", "risk 2", "risk 3"],
  "opportunities": ["opportunity 1", "opportunity 2"],
  "monitoring_kpis": ["KPI 1 with target", "KPI 2 with target", "KPI 3 with target"],
  "one_line_verdict": "Single memorable sentence summarizing the recommendation"
}

Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown. No preamble.

nodes.name: Claude AI Insight Generator
nodes.notes: Native AI Agent node. Connect an Anthropic Claude model sub-node as the language model.

nodes.name: Parse AI Insights
nodes.notes: Parses Claude JSON. Falls back to rule-based insights if API fails.

nodes.name: Alert Evaluation
nodes.notes: Evaluates alert conditions: competitor undercut, margin breach, high abandonment, large price change.

nodes.name: Has High/Critical Alert?
nodes.notes: Branches: Yes = send Telegram alert immediately. Both paths continue to Sheets + Email.

nodes.name: Format Sheets Row
nodes.notes: Flattens all analysis into a clean Google Sheets row for dashboard tracking.

nodes.name: Write to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends recommendation row to dashboard sheet. Set up Google Sheets OAuth credential.

nodes.name: Compose Email Report
nodes.notes: Generates rich HTML email with full analysis, simulation table, alerts, and AI insights.

nodes.name: Log & Deduplicate
nodes.notes: Logs run metadata. Generates deduplication key. Replace console.log with DB write in production.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "status": "success",
  "run_id": "{{ $('Compose Email Report').item.json.run_id }}",
  "product": "{{ $('Compose Email Report').item.json.product_name }}",
  "recommended_price": "{{ $json.price_recommendation?.recommended_price ?? 'N/A' }}",
  "confidence_score": "{{ $json.confidence_score ?? 0 }}",
  "one_line_verdict": "{{ $json.ai_insights?.one_line_verdict ?? '' }}",
  "alert_count": "{{ ($json.active_alerts ?? []).length }}",
  "report_generated_at": "{{ $('Compose Email Report').item.json.report_generated_at }}"
}

nodes.name: Webhook Response
nodes.notes: Returns summary JSON to webhook caller. Includes recommendation + confidence.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches workflow-level errors. Extend to send error Telegram/email notifications.
